flags.description: A comma-separated list of Gradle configurations to exclude. Detect will skip any Gradle configurations specified via this property.
flags.guidance: If the project has test configurations and the user wants a clean, production-only BOM, exclude them here. When isAndroidProject=true, the recommended value is debug,test to exclude all debug and test build variants.

flags.description: A comma-separated list of Gradle subprojects to exclude by name.
flags.guidance: Use if the user wants to skip specific subprojects by their simple name.

flags.description: Gradle configuration types to exclude (e.g., UNRESOLVED). Including unresolved configurations could lead to false positives.
flags.guidance: If the user wants to reduce BOM clutter and prevent false positives from Gradle configurations that cannot be resolved, set this to 'UNRESOLVED'.

flags.description: If set to true, Gradle Native Inspector will only evaluate root project dependencies.
flags.guidance: Use if the user explicitly states they ONLY want to scan the root project and ignore all subprojects. Do not combine this with included/excluded project flags.
